name_cocrystal.text: Dacarbazine-Fumaric Acid Cocrystal (DTIC-H2FUM). 50 mg of DTIC ... and 31.8 mg of fumaric acid ...

name_cocrystal.text: Dacarbazine Hydrogen-Citrate Salt-Cocrystal (DTIC-HCIT). 50 mg of DTIC ... citric acid was added ...

ratio_cocrystal.text: The ASU contains a DTICH+ cation, a hydrogen-citrate anion (H2CIT−), a neutral DTIC, and four independent water molecules.
